# AI Context for @json-express/plugin-identity

Adds JWT authentication, registration, and password resets to JSONExpress.

## Registration
Do not attempt to write custom middleware for auth. Use the preset:
```typescript
import { presetIdentity } from '@json-express/preset-identity';
kernel.register(presetIdentity({ secret: process.env.JWT_SECRET }));
```

## Models
Use the `access` block to protect resources:
```typescript
export default defineModel({
  // ...fields
  access: {
    read: 'public', // No token required
    create: 'user', // Requires any valid JWT
    update: 'owner' // Requires the JWT to match the document's ownerId
  }
});
```

## AI Instruction
Never try to hash passwords manually using bcrypt in model hooks. This plugin automatically hooks into the `users` model and hashes passwords using Argon2id.
